---
title: "AERA Paper"
format: docx
editor: source
params:
  year: "2024-25"
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(flextable)
library(pins)
library(ftExtra)
library(here)

if (interactive()) {
  params <- rmarkdown::yaml_front_matter(
    rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path
  )$params
}

percent_indicators <- c(
  "absenteeism",
  "graduation",
  "suspension",
  "college/career"
)

local_board <- board_folder(here("../cde_data_pipeline/data/pins"))

homeless <- pin_read(local_board, "homeless_enrollment_clean") |>
  filter(
    county_name == "Solano",
    charter_school == "All" | aggregate_level == "S",
    dass == "All" | aggregate_level == "S"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    percent_homeless = homeless_student_enrollment /
      cumulative_enrollment *
      100,
    across(ends_with("(percent)"), parse_number)
  )

solano_to_orange <- read_csv("data/solano_to_orange.csv") |>
  mutate(
    currstatus = if_else(
      indicator %in% percent_indicators,
      paste0(currstatus, "%"),
      as.character(currstatus)
    )
  )

homeless_lea <-
  homeless |>
  filter(
    academic_year == params$year,
    (aggregate_level == "D" & charter_school == "All" & dass == "All") |
      (aggregate_level == "S" & charter_school == "Yes")
  )

homeless_count_cumulative <-
  homeless_lea |>
  filter(reporting_long == "Total Students") |>
  pull(homeless_student_enrollment) |>
  nth(1)

selected_to_orange <-
  solano_to_orange |>
  filter(
    color == 1,
    academic_year == params$year,
    (aggregate_level == "S" & charter_school == "Yes") |
      (aggregate_level == "D")
  ) |>
  mutate(
    reporting_long = fct_relevel(
      as_factor(reporting_long),
      "Homeless Youth" # Foster Youth removed here
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(reporting_long)

homeless_count <-
  selected_to_orange |>
  # Swapped student_count for homeless_student_enrollment
  filter(reporting_long == "Homeless Youth", !is.na(homeless_student_enrollment))

```

```{r district_example}
#| echo: false

fsusd_example <-
  selected_to_orange |>
  filter(district_name == "Fairfield-Suisun Unified") |>
  select(
    indicator,
    reporting_long,
    currdenom,
    homeless_student_enrollment,
    students_to_orange
  )

fsusd_homeless_red_indicators <-
  fsusd_example |>
  filter(reporting_long == "Homeless Youth") |>
  pull(indicator)

fsusd_example |>
  filter(
    reporting_long != "Homeless Youth",
    homeless_student_enrollment > 0
  ) |>
  mutate(homeless_red_too = indicator %in% fsusd_homeless_red_indicators) |>
  mutate(
    indicator = if_else(
      homeless_red_too,
      paste0("**", indicator, "**"),
      indicator
    )
  ) |>
  select(
    reporting_long,
    homeless_student_enrollment,
    indicator,
    students_to_orange
  ) |>
  flextable() |>
  set_header_labels(
    values = c(
      "Student Group",
      "Students also in Homeless Youth Group",
      "Indicator",
      "Number of students needed to change color to Orange"
    )
  ) |>
  merge_v(j = c(1, 2)) |>
  width(width = c(1.5, 2, 1, 1.6)) |>
  theme_vanilla() |>
  colformat_md()

```

```{r red_homeless_indicators_table}
#| echo: false
#| tbl-cap: "Table showing status of indicators for homeless youth group that are red."

districts_with_homeless_red <-
  selected_to_orange |>
  filter(
    aggregate_level == "D",
    reporting_long == "Homeless Youth"
  ) |>
  select(district_name, indicator, currstatus) |>
  distinct() 

districts_with_homeless_red |>
  mutate(
    # 1. Anonymize the districts
    district_name = case_match(
      district_name,
      "Benicia Unified" ~ "District A",
      "Dixon Unified" ~ "District B",
      "Fairfield-Suisun Unified" ~ "District C",
      "Travis Unified" ~ "District D",
      "Vacaville Unified" ~ "District E", 
      "Vallejo City Unified" ~ "District F"
    ),
    # 2. Format the indicator names BEFORE pivoting
    indicator = case_match(
      indicator,
      "suspension" ~ "Suspension",
      "absenteeism" ~ "Chronic Absenteeism",
      "college/career" ~ "College/Career",
      "ELA" ~ "ELA", # Keeps it all-caps
      .default = str_to_title(indicator) # Capitalizes 'Math' and 'Graduation' automatically
    )
  ) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = indicator, values_from = currstatus) |>
  flextable() |>
  # 3. Safely target just the one column we know will ALWAYS exist
  set_header_labels(district_name = "District") |>
  autofit()

```

```{r results_table}
#| echo: false
#| tbl-cap: "Number of indicator/student group pairs where the number of students needed to change the group to orange is less than the number of students from that group that are also in the homeless youth group."

districts <-
  selected_to_orange |>
  pull(district_name) |>
  unique()

district_count <- length(districts)

homeless_red <-
  selected_to_orange |>
  filter(reporting_long == "Homeless Youth", color == 1)

homeless_greater_than_change <-
  selected_to_orange |>
  filter(
    reporting_long != "Homeless Youth",
    color == 1,
    homeless_student_enrollment > 0
  ) |>
  mutate(greater = homeless_student_enrollment - students_to_orange) |>
  arrange(desc(greater)) |>
  select(
    district_name,
    indicator,
    reporting_long,
    homeless_student_enrollment,
    students_to_orange
  )

student_group_counts <-
  homeless_greater_than_change |>
  group_by(district_name) |>
  summarize("Indicator/Groups" = n())

student_group_counts |>
  mutate(
    district_name = case_match(
      district_name,
      "Benicia Unified" ~ "District A",
      "Dixon Unified" ~ "District B",
      "Fairfield-Suisun Unified" ~ "District C",
      "Travis Unified" ~ "District D",
      "Vacaville Unified" ~ "District E", # Typo fixed here!
      "Vallejo City Unified" ~ "District F"
    )
  ) |>
  flextable() |>
  set_header_labels(values = c("District", "Indicator/Student Group Count")) |>
  autofit()

```

```{r suspension_changes}
#| echo: false
#| tbl-cap: "Showing the districts and student groups that are red for suspension and the difference of students needed to change that group to orange."

selected_to_orange |>
  filter(indicator == "suspension", homeless_student_enrollment > 0) |>
  mutate(
    district_name = case_match(
      district_name,
      "Benicia Unified" ~ "District A",
      "Dixon Unified" ~ "District B",
      "Fairfield-Suisun Unified" ~ "District C",
      "Travis Unified" ~ "District D",
      "Vacaville Unified" ~ "District E",
      "Vallejo City Unified" ~ "District F"
    )
  ) |>
  select(
    district_name,
    reporting_long,
    homeless_student_enrollment,
    indicator,
    students_to_orange
  ) |>
  arrange(district_name) |>
  flextable() |>
  merge_v(j = 1) |>
  set_header_labels(
    values = c(
      "District",
      "Student Group",
      "Students also in Homeless Youth Group",
      "Indicator",
      "Number of students needed to change color to Orange"
    )
  ) |>
  theme_vanilla() |>
  width(width = c(1, 1.5, 1.5, 1, 2))

```
